calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Oct-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-12-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROBERT KWONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Summary adjudication of the third cause of action granted. The court denies Defendant Kwong's motion for summary judgment because a disputed issue of material fact exists as to whether Defendant Kwong breached his duty of care to Plaintiff Zhu by failing to respond quickly enough to Defendant Li's alleged assault and battery of Plaintiff Zhu. (Undisputed Material Fact #55; Plaintiff's Separate Statement of Undisputed Facts # 6-9.) The court grants a summary adjudication of the third cause of action for declaratory relief. Plaintiff Zhu's request that Defendant Li be removed from the premises is rendered moot by the fact that Defendant Li vacated the premises on March 31, 2015. Plaintiff Zhu's request that Defendant Kwong observe the prior terms of the lease is unfounded. First, the evidence indicates that the rear door is self closing and automatically locks. Second, the prior lease agreement does not state that the upstairs bathroom is Plaintiff Zhu's private bathroom. Rather, the upstairs bathroom is to be shared with the tenant in unit 2 and can be used by the tenants living downstairs in emergency situations. (Defendant's Ex. D.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
